patch_decision: Disciplined hold (0 pages). No diagnosable content gap this run. The one losing query with an existing target page (colorado-ai-act-small-business) was verified to already cover the winning mechanism comprehensively — patching would be speculative (rule 4) and over-optimization churn. All other losses are pillar/asset-gated, just-shipped (partner 6/25), or indexing-latency (assessment). Remaining durable gains = pillars, not patches.
